name: The East-gate
arrival: Grey daylight fades behind you as you pass beneath the great arch.

name: Old Moria
arrival: The oldest halls. The shadows are thick with ghosts, and a faint stench of burnt flesh lingers.

name: The Dwarrowdelf
arrival: Durin's city opens around you, vast and dark -- once full of light, now one great tomb.

name: The Chamber of Mazarbul
arrival: Iron-bound chests of crumbling records line the walls. Something died defending this room.

name: The Deeps
arrival: Below the city, the planned halls give way to an endless, unplanned labyrinth.

name: The Armouries of the Third Deep
arrival: Racks of dwarven arms -- and the poisoned dead who still guard them, as if only sleeping.

name: Goblin Village
arrival: Cook-fires gutter in an old market square. Yellow eyes track you from the dark.

name: The Udun-Temple
arrival: The air thickens with soot and ash. A single word echoes through the smoke: Ghash. Fire.

name: The Den of Forgotten Stars
arrival: Flecks of mithril glitter in the walls like a sky of forgotten stars.

name: The Balrog's Throne
arrival: The darkness here is absolute. Flames burn but shed no light. You should not have delved so deep.
